div.head: The Secretary of State to the Ambassador in Colombia (Braden)
div.p: 46. Your 49, February 23, 10 p.m. The Colombian Ambassador here informed us that he is awaiting the detailed information regarding specific projects essential to the proper presentation of Colombia’s request for credits from the Export-Import Bank. It is believed that the various agencies here concerned with the extension of credits would prefer to have an exact idea of what Colombia desires to achieve before offering comment as to the best ways of attaining these objectives.
